---
name: Task
about: A specific piece of work to be completed
title: "[TASK] "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the task to be completed.

## Background
Why is this task necessary? What is the context?

## Requirements
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Requirement 3

## Impact
- [ ] High (blocks other work)
- [ ] Medium (important for milestone)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)

## Estimated Effort
- [ ] Small (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days)
- [ ] Large (> 3 days)

## Dependencies
List any dependencies or blockers for this task.

## References
- Related issues: #
- Documentation:
- Design specs:

## Exit Criteria
- [ ] All requirements implemented
- [ ] Code reviewed
- [ ] Tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated
